questions.question: What will the righteous servant be satisfied with?
questions.answers: He will be satisfied with his knowledge ("יִשְׂבָּע בְּדַעְתּוֹ").

questions.question: From whose toil or suffering will the servant be able to see?
questions.answers: From the travail of his soul ("מֵעֲמַל נַפְשׁוֹ יִרְאֶה").

questions.question: What will the righteous servant do for many people?
questions.answers: He will justify many ("יַצְדִּיק צַדִּיק עַבְדִּי לָרַבִּים").

questions.question: What will the servant bear?
questions.answers: He will bear their iniquities ("וַעֲוֹנֹתָם הוּא יִסְבֹּל").
